calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Off Calendar

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Denied

Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Feb-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TANYA COLBERT's Motion To Vacate Judgment IS continued to February 6, 2014 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers, respectively, to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 6, 2014 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Tanya Colbert, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearance.

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-14-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Proof of service has not been provided to the Court.
DEFENDANT TANYA COLBERT'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
